reasoning: This is a unique identifier (UUID) for clients, which has no predictive value for modeling.
This represents a continuous monetary value. Missing values are best handled by median imputation.
Unstructured text fields contain valuable sentiment or keywords but cannot be used as-is. NLP feature extraction is recommended.
This is a boolean or low-cardinality indicator. Missing values should be imputed with the most frequent class (mode).
Zip codes are high-cardinality categorical variables. One-hot encoding would explode the feature space, so target encoding is preferred.
SKU codes are often too granular and high-cardinality to be useful unless grouped into broader categories. If grouping isn't possible, drop.
Percentages are continuous numeric features bounded between 0 and 100. Median imputation handles missingness robustly.
